title: Messenger Thread
description: Channel v1 Messenger thread contract used for private conversation context and public-comment-to-private handoff.
$comment: Sources: PACK-06 and TECH-06. Messenger/private channel may carry private context only under policy and must preserve source context from public comment handoff.

source_comment_id.description: Public comment that initiated this private thread, if any.

visibility_state.description: Visibility state, normally private-safe for Messenger.

private_context_confirmed.description: Whether private thread is bound and safe to continue private workflow.

human_takeover_status.description: Human takeover status when human agent is required.
